features: Certified by Consumer Goods - Leigh, Intertek Group Plc - 2022
Made from 100 percent recycled tear-resistant LDPE film
Perfect for everyday use, household, office, kitchen and caterers
description: Product Description KEY FEATURES Perfect for Everyday Use Catering for multiple use from household to garden, office and much more.. Our quality tested sacks and bags are suited for many different tasks including demanding use. True in Size & Capacity 725mm width with a rim opening of 1450mm, 850mm length. Fits the average bin without hassle. Leak resistance as standard. Eco in Mind Sustainable with traceability as we collect the waste within the UK, sort, process, recycle then produce in Britain minimising our carbon footprint. Made in Britain Made in Britain with Quality (ISO 9001) & Environmental Management (ISO 14001) accredited compliance systems. Certified by Consumer Goods - Leigh, Intertek Group Plc - 2022 Bursting Strength 26.2 Kpa - BS EN ISO 13938-2: 1999 Elmendorf Tear Across warp average 6.07 N - BS EN ISO 13937-1: 2000 Elmendorf Tear Across weft average 6 N - BS EN ISO 13937-1: 2000 Tensile Properties Grab Method Warp average 38.7 N - BS EN ISO 13934-2: 2014 Tensile Properties Grab Method Weft average 30.5 N - BS EN ISO 13934-2: 2014
